win_condition: After final round, player with highest village point total wins.
tiebreaker: If tied, tied player with most reputation wins; if still tied, tied player with most remaining resources wins.

categories.label: Buildings and Outposts
categories.description: VP printed on constructed buildings, key buildings, and outposts.

categories.label: Advancement Track
categories.description: VP from progression on the advancement track.

categories.label: Reputation and Card Effects
categories.description: VP from reputation and any card-based endgame scoring effects.
